releases.name: Switch Exposure Centre 1.0.3
releases.author: auditadmin
releases.body_md:
Switch Exposure Centre **1.0.3** — GA.

First distinct 1.0 release (earlier `v1.0.0`-`v1.0.2` tags all aliased the same `1.0.0rc1` commit).

### Artifacts
- `switch-exposure-center_1.0.3_amd64.deb` (Debian/Ubuntu)
- `switch-exposure-center-1.0.3-1.x86_64.rpm` (RHEL/Rocky/AlmaLinux/Fedora)

Both bundle an offline Python 3.12 wheelhouse (no network pip at install). `SHA256SUMS-1.0.3.txt` covers both; Linux packages are signed via the AuditToolkit Release Signing key. Linux-only product (no Windows artifacts). See `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`.

### Validated
Boots on SQLite, health/readiness green, console renders with 0 JS errors; 248 unit tests pass; bandit 0 high / 0 medium.

releases.name: AuditToolkit Switch Exposure Centre 2026.1 RC1
releases.author: auditpushbot
releases.body_md:
## AuditToolkit Switch Exposure Centre 2026.1 — RC1

Network switch exposure analysis and reporting service (port 5001).

**Install (Debian/Ubuntu):** `dpkg -i switch-exposure-center_1.0.0~rc1_amd64.deb`

**SHA-256:**
```
7827accb9783c9e43ce5cc4fc3c2b1b11f0a9718ccd164ccad155d63101de401  switch-exposure-center_1.0.0~rc1_amd64.deb
```
